details.detail: Merged split en segments and realigned ko translations. Fixed ~40 misaligned entries with shift-by-1 pattern throughout. Friends compilation (clothes, football, leather pants, pivot, sphinx cat, unagi, spray tan).
ko[0] contained merged translation for en[0]+en[1]. Split and shifted remaining ko entries to match their en counterparts. Fight Club plane scene.

ko shifted by 1 starting from entry 5. en[5] had 'Depends' content whose ko was missing. Realigned entries 5-13 by shifting ko down and providing new ko for entry 5. Wolf of Wall Street Swiss banker scene.
ko shifted by 1 from entry 2 onwards due to merged translation in ko[1]. Realigned all 15 entries. Conan O'Brien casting sketch.
ko shifted by 1 from entry 7 due to merged ko[6] covering en[6]+en[7]. Realigned 10 entries. South Park teachers trial scene.
ko shifted by 1 from entry 3 due to merged ko[2] covering en[2]+en[3]. Realigned 9 entries. Friends Cher impersonation scene.
ko shifted by 1 for entries 10-12. en[10]='You bloated douchebag' had ko for en[11]. Realigned 3 entries. Jimmy Kimmel Mean Tweets.
ko[15] for 'Plus it's always fun to see Tom faint' had wrong ko (belonged to next entry). Provided correct translation. Parks and Rec Ron Swanson tooth scene.
